Name: SSAO
Description: Screen Space Ambient Occlusion (SSAO) post-processing technique that approximates soft shadowing in creases, corners, and contact areas by analyzing depth differences in screen space to simulate indirect ambient light occlusion.

Fields.Name: Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Offset applied to sampling kernel positions used in SSAO calculations, influencing noise distribution and occlusion pattern variation.

Fields.Name: Depth Clip Range
Fields.Description: Maximum depth range used for occlusion evaluation, limiting how far SSAO considers geometry for ambient shadowing.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 0
Fields.Description: Primary depth range used in SSAO sampling pass 0, defining near-field occlusion sensitivity.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 1
Fields.Description: Secondary depth evaluation range used to refine mid-range ambient occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 2
Fields.Description: Tertiary depth evaluation range controlling far-field occlusion influence in SSAO blending.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Scale
Fields.Description: Global intensity multiplier for ambient occlusion, controlling overall shadow depth in crevices and contact areas.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Offset
Fields.Description: Bias adjustment for ambient occlusion, used to shift baseline brightness and reduce self-shadowing artifacts.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 0
Fields.Description: Blend factor for first AO layer, controlling contribution strength in multi-pass occlusion accumulation.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 1
Fields.Description: Blend factor for second AO layer, refining mid-frequency occlusion detail.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 2
Fields.Description: Blend factor for third AO layer, used for fine-grained or distant occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 0
Fields.Description: Blur radius for first SSAO pass, smoothing raw occlusion noise into softer ambient shadowing.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 1
Fields.Description: Blur radius for second SSAO pass, further refining occlusion smoothness across surfaces.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Blur radius for third SSAO pass, applied for high-quality smoothing of occlusion results.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius: 1
Fields.Description: Final-stage blur radius applied to SSAO output, controlling overall softness of ambient shadowing.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary final blur radius used for additional smoothing or multi-directional blur refinement.

Fields.Name: Final Blur 4x2
Fields.Description: Enables a specific 4x2 separable blur kernel for final SSAO smoothing, improving performance or quality trade-offs.

Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall opacity of the SSAO effect, controlling how strongly ambient occlusion darkening affects the final image.
